summary: Migrate Atlas DB from MongoDB to Postgres
description: Alice is leading this migration. We decided to use Postgres for ACID compliance. Bob will handle the Kubernetes deployment changes. Target: end of Q1.

summary: Set up Kafka for Phoenix event pipeline
description: Replace RabbitMQ with Kafka. Bob owns this. Grace will integrate the Orion consumer. Redis will be used as a dead-letter queue buffer.
Carol is leading the JavaScript to TypeScript migration across all React components. Dave will review the dashboard components. Target: end of Q1.
Review JWT and OAuth implementation in the Atlas API. Alice to approve final design. Open question: rate limiting at Nginx layer — TBD.
